personalities.desc_zh: 你是一个天生的领导者，总能精准拿捏局面。你的掌控欲不是出于自私，而是你相信自己能把事情做好。这种自信让你在团队中自然成为核心人物。
personalities.desc_en: You were born to lead, always knowing exactly how to handle any situation. Your desire to control isn't selfish—you genuinely believe you can do things right. This confidence makes you a natural center in any group.

personalities.desc_zh: 你有强烈的领袖气质，目标感极强。你不满足于跟随别人，誓要成为制定规则的人。你的野心不是说说而已，而是刻在骨子里的DNA。
personalities.desc_en: You have strong leadership qualities and a clear sense of purpose. You refuse to follow others—you were born to make the rules. Your ambition isn't just talk, it's in your DNA.

personalities.desc_zh: 你看透了这个世界的虚伪，标准的
。你对很多事情都持怀疑态度，不是你消极，而是你拒绝被欺骗。你的毒舌是你保护自己的盔甲。
personalities.desc_en: You've seen through all the fake facades of this world. You're the classic 'clear-minded' person. You're skeptical about many things—not because you're negative, but because you refuse to be fooled. Your sharp tongue is your armor.

personalities.desc_zh: 你最大的武器就是
。不是软弱，而是你真的不想把精力花在争斗上。你像水一样柔和，却能渗透任何障碍。你的存在就是为了让周围的人感到舒服。
personalities.desc_en: Your greatest weapon is 'not fighting'. It's not weakness—you just don't want to waste energy on conflicts. You're like water, soft but can penetrate any obstacle. Your existence is to make others comfortable.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是那种会把朋友当成家人照顾的人。你的温暖不是装的，而是从心底自然流露。你记得住所有人的喜好和忌口，这种细心让你成为朋友们的
personalities.desc_en: You treat friends like family. Your warmth isn't pretend—it naturally flows from your heart. You remember everyone's preferences and dislikes. This attentiveness makes you everyone's 'rock'.

personalities.desc_zh: 独处对你来说不是孤独，而是充电。你享受一个人做事的感觉，不是因为讨厌别人，而是因为合群太累。你有自己的节奏，不受任何人影响。
personalities.desc_en: Solitude isn't loneliness for you—it's recharging. You enjoy doing things alone, not because you hate people, but because fitting in is exhausting. You have your own rhythm, unaffected by anyone.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是朋友圈里的气氛担当，只要有你在就不会冷场。你自带搞笑基因，总能在尴尬时救场。你用幽默来面对生活的苦涩，也是你独特的生存之道。
personalities.desc_en: You're the vibe setter in your friend group—wherever you are, it's never awkward. You have natural comedy genes and always save the day in awkward moments. You use humor to face life's bitterness—it's your unique survival method.

personalities.desc_zh: 你总是想很多，属于
。你对事物的洞察力异于常人，常常能看到别人忽略的细节。你不轻易发表看法，但一旦开口就是重点。
personalities.desc_en: You always think a lot—you're a 'giant in thought'. Your insight into things is extraordinary, often noticing details others miss. You don't speak easily, but when you do, it's the point.

personalities.desc_zh: 你最大的特点就是
。你不会为了迎合别人而伪装自己，有什么说什么。这种坦诚有时会伤人，但你觉得总比虚伪好。你活得很自在。
personalities.desc_en: Your biggest trait is being 'real'. You won't pretend to please others—you say what you think. This frankness sometimes hurts, but you think it's better than being fake. You live freely.
personalities.tagline_en: This is me, deal with it

personalities.desc_zh: 你属于那种
的人。不是你没有价值，而是你选择了低调。你不太会主动争取什么，但只要被需要，你就会出现。你的安静是一种力量。
personalities.desc_en: You're the type with 'low presence'. It's not that you have no value—it's that you choose to be low-key. You don't actively fight for things, but when needed, you show up. Your quietness is a kind of power.
personalities.tagline_en: Can't see me, can't see me

personalities.desc_zh: 你就像一个小太阳，走到哪里温暖到哪里。你的善意不是刻意为之，而是本能。你总是先想到别人，这种温柔让你拥有超好的人缘。
personalities.desc_en: You act like a little sun, warming wherever you go. Your kindness isn't刻意—it's instinct. You always think of others first. This gentleness gives you excellent popularity.

personalities.desc_zh: 你总是游离在主流之外，不是你被排斥，而是你主动选择了不同的道路。你的叛逆不是刻意为之，而是你真的不想
。你有自己的小众审美和独特的生活方式。
personalities.desc_en: You're always on the fringe of mainstream—not because you're excluded, but because you actively chose a different path. Your rebellion isn't刻意—you really don't want to be 'normal'. You have your own niche tastes and unique lifestyle.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是那种
的人。很多事情你看得很透，不是因为你经历得多，而是你有天赋。你常常说出一些很有哲理的话，让人觉得
personalities.desc_en: You're the type who's 'figured it out'. You see through many things—not because you've experienced a lot, but because you have the talent. You often say philosophical things that make people think 'wow, so true'.

personalities.desc_zh: 你体内有一匹不受控制的野马，渴望自由，讨厌约束。你的灵魂是向往旷野的，任何试图把你套住的东西都会让你想逃离。你的人生关键词是
personalities.desc_en: You have an uncontrollable wild horse inside you, craving freedom, hating constraints. Your soul yearns for the open range—anything that tries to cage you makes you want to escape. Your life keyword is 'adventure'.

personalities.desc_zh: 你自带
的气场，不是高冷，而是你的气场自动过滤掉不熟的人。你话不多，但每一句都很有分量。你是那种
的人。
personalities.desc_en: You naturally have a 'don't approach me' aura—not being cold, but your vibe automatically filters out unfamiliar people. You don't talk much, but every word carries weight. You're the type who 'doesn't need to explain'.

personalities.desc_zh: 你就像一颗软糖，外表软乎乎，内心甜甜的。你很容易相处，几乎没有攻击性。你总是用善意去理解别人，这种温柔有时会让自己受伤。
personalities.desc_en: You act like a gummy candy—soft on the outside, sweet inside. You're easy to get along with, almost non-aggressive. You always use kindness to understand others—this gentleness sometimes hurts yourself.

personalities.desc_zh: 你的言辞像刀一样锋利，看问题一针见血。你不喜欢拐弯抹角，有话直说。这种风格让你得罪过人，但也让你获得了
的称号。
personalities.desc_en: Your words are as sharp as a knife, getting to the point immediately. You don't like beating around the bush—straight to the point. This style has offended people, but also earned you the title of 'clear-minded'.
personalities.tagline_zh: 我说话就这样，爱听不听
personalities.tagline_en: That's how I speak, take it or leave it

personalities.desc_zh: 你的脑子里装满了各种奇思妙想，常人难以理解。你活在自己的世界里，那里有无限可能。你的梦想不是空想，而是你前进的动力。
personalities.desc_en: Your brain is full of wild ideas that normal people can't understand. You live in your own world, where anything is possible. Your dreams aren't fantasies—they're your motivation to move forward.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是理性代言人，凡事都要讲逻辑。你不会感情用事做任何决定，所有事情都要分析得明明白白。你的理性有时显得冷漠，但这才是你的魅力所在。
personalities.desc_en: You're the representative of rationality—everything must be logical. You never make decisions based on emotion; everything must be analyzed clearly. Your rationality sometimes seems cold, but that's your charm.

personalities.desc_zh: 你就像一个小火花，总能在平淡的生活中点燃一些惊喜。你的点子很多，创意无限。和你在一起永远不会无聊，因为你总能找到新鲜玩法。
personalities.desc_en: You act like a little spark, always igniting surprises in ordinary life. You have tons of ideas, infinite creativity. You'll never be bored with you around because you always find new ways to play.

personalities.desc_zh: 你像水一样灵活，懂得顺势而为。你不会硬碰硬，而是懂得变通。你的适应能力很强，无论什么环境都能快速融入。你的人生哲学是
personalities.desc_en: You flow like water, knowing how to go with the flow. You won't fight hard—you know how to adapt. Your adaptability is strong, quickly fitting into any environment. Your life philosophy is 'let it be'.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是那种
的人，很清楚自己要什么，不会被外界影响。你的安全感来自内心的稳定，而不是外在的浮华。你是朋友中那个最可靠的后盾。
personalities.desc_en: You're the type to 'settle down', very clear about what you want, not influenced by outside world. Your sense of security comes from inner stability, not external glamour. You're the most reliable anchor among friends.

personalities.desc_zh: 你的胸怀像天空一样宽广，不会斤斤计较。你的视野很高，常常能看到别人看不到的东西。你不会拘泥于小节，有着大将之风。
personalities.desc_en: Your胸怀 is as wide as the sky, not petty. Your vision is high, often seeing things others can't. You don't dwell on small things—you have the bearing of a general.

personalities.desc_zh: 自由是你的信条，任何束缚都让你想逃离。你不想被任何标签定义，也不care别人的眼光。你的人生自己做主，这就是你的生活方式。
personalities.desc_en: Freedom is your creed—any restraints make you want to escape. You don't want to be defined by any labels, don't care about others' opinions. You control your own life—this is your lifestyle.

personalities.desc_zh: 你的内心住着一个
，表面不动声色，内心戏很足。你对很多事情看得比较透，但选择不说。你有着独特的
personalities.desc_en: A 'dark knight' lives in your heart—calm on the surface, full of inner drama. You see through many things but choose not to speak. You have unique 'dark charm'.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是那种会发光的人，走到哪都是焦点。你自带磁场，吸引着周围的人。你的自信不是装的，而是从心底散发出来。和你在一起，会被你的能量感染。
personalities.desc_en: You're the type that shines, the center of attention wherever you go. You have your own magnetic field, attracting people around you. Your confidence isn't pretend—it's natural. Being with you, you'll be infected by your energy.

personalities.desc_zh: 你就像山谷里的回声，总能精准反射别人的情绪。你善于倾听，是很好的倾诉对象。但有时你会过度共情，忘记了自己的需求。
personalities.desc_en: You act like an echo in a valley, always precisely reflecting others' emotions. You're good at listening, a great person to talk to. But sometimes you over-empathize, forgetting your own needs.

personalities.desc_zh: 你选择了隐藏人格
——人生苦短，及时行乐！管他呢，先喝为敬！你知道生活已经够严肃了，偶尔放纵一下又何妨？今晚不醉不归！
personalities.desc_en: You chose the hidden personality 'Drunkard'—life is short, enjoy it! Who cares, cheers first! You know life is serious enough, why not let loose sometimes? Let's get drunk tonight!
